scripts.db:migration:create: uv run --project apps/backend alembic -c apps/backend/alembic.ini revision --autogenerate
scripts.test:backend: uv run --project apps/backend pytest -c apps/backend/pyproject.toml apps/backend/tests
scripts.lint:backend: uv run --project apps/backend ruff check apps/backend && uv run --project apps/backend mypy --config-file apps/backend/pyproject.toml
scripts.deploy:build: docker compose --env-file deploy/oci/.env -f deploy/oci/compose.yaml build backend
scripts.deploy:pull: docker compose --env-file deploy/oci/.env -f deploy/oci/compose.yaml pull backend caddy
scripts.deploy:migrate: docker compose --env-file deploy/oci/.env -f deploy/oci/compose.yaml --profile migrate run --rm --no-deps --pull never migrate
scripts.deploy:backend: docker compose --env-file deploy/oci/.env -f deploy/oci/compose.yaml up -d --no-build --pull missing backend caddy
scripts.test: bun run --if-present --filter @booth-plus/extension test && bun run test:backend
scripts.check: bun run compile && bun run test && bun run lint:backend
